description: Use this API to remove an auxiliary signal model from the specified injection point of the designated two-terminal dc line. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = ttdcauxmod_remove(dc, isgndx)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Quoted name of the two-terminal dc line receiving the of the auxiliary signal model; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left- justified name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: isgndx
parameters.description: Auxiliary signal injection point number, or the auxiliary signal index. (input; 1 by default).

error_codes.description: invalid ISGNDX value for a two-terminal dc line.
no auxiliary signal model at this index for this two-terminal dc line.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
